headline: General Mills Drops 21% Year to Date: How Should You Play the Stock?
summary: GIS drops 21% YTD as weak demand, margin pressure and rising costs weigh on earnings and cloud near-term recovery outlook.

headline: Wells Fargo Lowers J.M. Smucker (SJM) Price Target as Cost Pressures Persist
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) is included among the 15 Blue Chip Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 8, Wells Fargo analyst Chris Carey lowered the firm’s price recommendation on The J. M. Smucker Company (NYSE:SJM) to $125 from $135. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the stock.
